_provenance: Digitized 2026-06-12 from OSM stage footprint (way 490428003) + Esri World Imagery + USGS 1m DEM diagnostics. All anchor values INFERRED (imagery/OSM-derived), not surveyed.
stage_rect_note: OSM stage canopy footprint (lens-shaped); deck likely smaller than rect
arc_center_note: stage-front center = stage centroid moved 8.2 m along az 200.9 (half of OSM short dim)

breaks_ft._basis: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure; row1 = first terrace seat-wall, top = lawn crest before promenade

fan_deg._basis: inferred from DEM hillshade terrace extent + radial fan scan (smooth monotonic rise sector); +/-10 deg

stage_frontage_ft._basis: inferred: lens-canopy chord facing audience from OSM footprint (long dim 110 ft); deck edge slightly inside canopy

stage_depth_ft._basis: inferred: OSM canopy short dim 54 ft; deck inset

row_count_note: stone seat-wall terraces lower bowl + open lawn above

row_count_inferred._basis: inferred: hillshade/imagery arc count ring 8-38 m; 1 m DEM cannot resolve individual seat walls

ada_circulation_note: level entry plaza at stage sides; flanking paths both sides of lawn; cross path mid-bowl ~ring 35 m (imagery)
backdrop_note: audience faces ~NNE across stage to pond + sculpture-park woodland; low covered stage, open landscape backdrop
capacity_basis: published lawn/event capacity (~1,900 on tiered lawn) — press-circulated figure; venue's own pages publish NO capacity; Wikipedia passage citation-needed. NOT a fixed-seat count

dem_verification.terrace_preservation: VERIFIED — hillshade resolves lawn-terrace/seat-wall arcs matching aerial imagery (diagnostic_dem.png vs diagnostic_imagery.png)
dem_verification.known_voids: pond N of stage is a flattened water return at 809.5 ft; ~18 in seat walls below 1 m resolution

route_concept.value: level garden-path entries at the bottom plaza (stage level) and along the rim promenade of a low bowl

vertical_drop_ft.value: 12.9 ft total bowl rise; both top and bottom reachable on garden paths without dedicated ramp structures

dispersion.value: likely bottom plaza + top-of-lawn positions (two elevations); not formally marked in any public source found

redundancy.value: paths flank both sides of the lawn

sightline_preservation.value: unverified; lawn venue with shallow rake
